prompt: A clean isometric 3D illustration of a cozy reading nook viewed from above-front. A wooden chair with a cream cushion, a small side table with a cup of coffee and an open book, a tall arched window with soft light, a potted fiddle-leaf fig plant, and a circular wool rug. Warm muted color palette: cream, sage green, soft terracotta. Flat shading with gentle ambient occlusion. White background, centered composition.
